zh.Framersheim, Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, R: 德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Petronella Wendel於大約1678年9月24日出生在德國賀瑟阿爾澤福拉莫斯海姆時，她的父親Johann Jacob Wendel29歲，母親Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel19歲。她於1697年1月15日與Johan Peter Becker在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1752年2月15日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆享年73歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟阿爾澤福拉莫斯海姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Petronella Wendel于大约1678年9月24日出生在德国賀瑟阿爾澤福拉莫斯海姆时，她的父亲Johann Jacob Wendel29岁，母亲Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel19岁。她于1697年1月15日与Johan Peter Becker在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1752年2月15日在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆享年73岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟阿爾澤福拉莫斯海姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wendel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Otto, Aloys, Bodo, Egon, Elke, Erwin, Frieda, Gerhard, Jurgen, Katharina.
German, Swedish, Danish, and Dutch: from the German personal name Wendel, a pet form of a short form, Wando, of a compound ancient Germanic name beginning with wand ‘to go, to migrate’.
German: metonymic occupational name for a turner, from Middle High German wendel ‘to turn’ or Middle Low German wendelen ‘to turn, twist’.

variants.name: Wendelin
meanings: South German: from the personal name Wendelin, a pet form of Wendel . Wendelin is the name of a Christian saint venerated in the Saarland, Germany.
Swedish: habitational name from a place called Vendel + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’. In some cases it may also be of German origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Wendl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans.
South German (Bavaria and Austria): variant of   Wendel  .

variants.name: Wendler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Kurt, Siegbert, Claus, Erwin, Ewald, Gerd, Hans, Helmut, Helmuth, Otto.
German:
from Middle High German wandeler ‘traveler on foot’ (Middle Low German wendeler), hence a nickname for a pilgrim or an occupational name for a peddler.

variants.name: Wandell
meanings: Variant of   Wendel  .

variants.name: Wendell
meanings: German, Swedish, and Danish: variant of Wendel and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (which can be also of Dutch origin). The surname Wendell is (very) rare in Germany, Sweden, and Denmark.
History: A prominent New Netherland (now NY) merchant family of this name descended from a colonist from Emden, Germany, which was part of the Netherlands in the 17th century.

variants.name: Wendle
meanings: South German: variant of   Wendel   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Wandel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Gerhard, Horst, Klaus.
German and Dutch: variant of   Wendel  .
Flemish (De Wandel): nickname for a pilgrim or an occupational name for a peddler, or a nickname for an unreliable person.

variants.name: Windels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Lothar.
German: patronymic from (a variant of) the personal name   Wendel  .
North German: metronymic from a short form of the female personal names Windelheid or Windelmod.

variants.name: Wendling
meanings: German:
habitational name from any of numerous places called Wendling, notably in Bavaria, or a place called Wendlingen, for example near Stuttgart.
(Westphalia): patronymic from the personal name Wendel (see Wendel 1).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Petronella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Fedele, Francesco, Marco, Salvatore, Vito.
Italian (southern): from Petronella, a feminine pet form of Petrone or Petronio .

variants.name: Petrone
meanings: From Latin Petronilla, originally a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Petronius (of uncertain derivation). The name Petronilla was borne by a 1st-century martyr, and early in the Christian era came to be connected with Peter , so that in many legends surrounding her she is described as a companion or even the daughter of St Peter .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Petronella Wendel was born about 24 September 1678, in Framersheim, Alzey, Hesse, Germany, her father, Johann Jacob Wendel, was 29 and her mother, Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel, was 19. She married Johan Peter Becker on 15 January 1697, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 15 February 1752, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 73, and was buried in Framersheim, Alzey, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Petronella Wendel est née environ 24 septembre 1678, à Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Johann Jacob Wendel, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Johan Peter Becker le 15 janvier 1697, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 février 1752, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Petronella Wendel um 24. September 1678 in Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Jacob Wendel 29 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel 19. Sie hat am 15. Januar 1697 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Johan Peter Becker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Februar 1752 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Petronella Wendel è nata il circa 24 settembre 1678 nel Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Germania, sua padre, Johann Jacob Wendel, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Johan Peter Becker il 15 gennaio 1697, nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 15 febbraio 1752, nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Germania.

ja.Framersheim,,, Germany: ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイム
ja.Framersheim, Rhineland-Pfalz, Palatinate: ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイム
ja.Framersheim, Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, R: ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイム
ja.lifeSummary: Anna Petronella Wendelが約1678年9月24日にドイツヘセンアルズエイフラムルシェイムで生まれた時，父Johann Jacob Wendelは29歳，母Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendelは19歳であった。1697年1月15日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムでJohan Peter Beckerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1752年2月15日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムで73歳で死去し，ドイツヘセンアルズエイフラムルシェイムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Petronella Wendel(이)가 대략 1678년 9월 24일 독일 헤센 알즈이 프레이머셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Jacob Wendel(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1697년 1월 15일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 Johan Peter Becker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1752년 2월 15일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 알즈이 프레이머셰임에 묻혔다.

mg.about 24 September 1678–15 February 1752: tany ho any amin'ny 24 septambra 1678–15 febroary 1752

mn.about 24 September 1678–15 February 1752: ойролцоогоор 1678 оны Есдүгээр сарын 24–1752 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 15

pt.about 24 September 1678–15 February 1752: aproximadamente 24 de setembro de 1678–15 de fevereiro de 1752
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Petronella Wendel nasceu aproximadamente 24 de setembro de 1678, em Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Jacob Wendel, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Johan Peter Becker em 15 de janeiro de 1697, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1752, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Petronella Wendel родилась около 24 сентября 1678 г. в местности фрамиршим, алзи, Гессен, Германия, её отцу по имени Johann Jacob Wendel было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johan Peter Becker 15 января 1697 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 15 февраля 1752 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности фрамиршим, алзи, Гессен, Германия.

sm.about 24 September 1678–15 February 1752: e tusa o le 24 Setema 1678–15 Fepuari 1752

es.about 24 September 1678–15 February 1752: aproximadamente 24 de septiembre de 1678–15 de febrero de 1752
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Petronella Wendel nació aproximadamente 24 de septiembre de 1678, en Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Alemania, su papá, Johann Jacob Wendel, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mrs. Johann Jacob Wendel, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Johan Peter Becker el 15 de enero de 1697, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1752, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Framersheim, Alzey, Hessen, Alemania.
